TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 608

RM 608, CHARLENE MITCHELL, JUDGE, CLACY, CLERK, DNEVILLE,CSR CAUSE CALLED FOR CONTESTED COURT TRIAL. PETER VESTAL FOR PLAINTIFF, JON HELM FOR DEFENDANT. FRANK TAM SWORN AS INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT CARLO WONG. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. PARTIES HAVE REACHED DISPOSION, PLACED ON RECORD, SEE CLERK'S MINUTES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW PING YUEN BAKERY & RESTAURANT $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,500.00, THE COMPLAINT AGAINST DEFENDANT CARLO WONG IS DISMISSED, EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS OF SUIT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
